title: NoSQL for modern apps and AI: The future of Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable
summary: Google Cloud presented advancements in NoSQL databases across Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable at Google Cloud Next 2026, emphasizing architectural innovations and product roadmaps optimized for AI and agentic applications. The session covered latest releases and customer implementations of these high-performance, scalable database services.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session from Google Cloud Next 2026 covers advancements across three NoSQL services: Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable. It presents architectural innovations and product roadmaps positioned for AI and agentic applications, along with recent releases and customer implementations. The focus is on high-performance, scalable database services optimized for modern app and AI workloads.
